formulas.name: 1. Modes of File Opening
formulas.notes: Modes: 'r' (read), 'w' (write), 'a' (append), 'r+' (read and write), 'w+' (read and write), 'a+' (read and append), 'rb' (read binary), 'wb' (write binary), etc.

formulas.name: 2. File Pointer Position
formulas.notes: File pointer is at the beginning of the file after opening in 'r' or 'w' mode, and at the end of the file in 'a' mode.

formulas.name: 3. Reading from a File
formulas.notes: Reads the entire contents of the file into the variable 'data'.

formulas.name: 4. Writing to a File
formulas.notes: Writes the string 'data' to the file.

formulas.name: 5. Closing a File
formulas.notes: Closes the file to free system resources.

formulas.name: 6. Checking End of File (EOF)
formulas.notes: Checks if the end of the file has been reached.

formulas.name: 7. File Existence Check
formulas.notes: Checks if a file with the given 'filename' exists.

formulas.name: 8. Deleting a File
formulas.notes: Deletes the file with the given 'filename'.

formulas.name: 10. Creating a New Directory
formulas.notes: Creates a new directory with the given 'directory_name'.
